=== no_title
# Panel without a title — plain double-line border, label child inside.
widget: panel
width: 22
height: 5
child_text: Panel content here
===
╔════════════════════╗
║╔══════════════════╗║
║║Panel content here║║
║╚══════════════════╝║
╚════════════════════╝

=== with_title
# Panel with a title in the top border.
widget: panel
width: 22
height: 5
panel_title: Settings
child_text: Panel content here
===
╔════════════════════╗
║╔═ Settings ═══════╗║
║║Panel content here║║
║╚══════════════════╝║
╚════════════════════╝

=== empty_child
# Panel with no child text — inner area is blank.
widget: panel
width: 22
height: 5
panel_title: Empty
===
╔════════════════════╗
║╔═ Empty ══════════╗║
║║                  ║║
║╚══════════════════╝║
╚════════════════════╝
